title: An alternate Japanese cast for Evangelion
display_title: An alternate Japanese cast for Evangelion
wikitext: []: An alternate Japanese cast for Evangelion             Quote Post by C. Smith » Sat Jan 25, 2025 3:32 am Given how eclectic the English dub cast of Evangelion has been, let's apply that same treatment to the Japanese cast (NOTE: no reprisals, not even having the OG VAs appear in a different role). Shinji Ikari - Ayumu Murase Rei Ayanami, Yui Ikari - Ai Kayano Asuka Langley - Haruka Tomatsu Touji Suzuhara - Yuuma Uchida Kaworu Nagisa - Mitsuki Saiga Marie Illustrious Makinami - Sumire Uesaka Gendo Ikari - Jun'ichi Suwabe Ritsuko Akagi - Hitomi Nabatame Kozo Fuyutsuki - Takaya Hashi Misato Katsuragi - Chiaki Takahashi Ryoji Kagi - Toshiyuki Morikawa or Tomokazu Sugita Maya Ibuki - Hiromi Igarashi Makoto Hyuuga - Kengo Kawanishi Shigeru Aoba - Yuuichi Nakamura Hikari Horaki - Aoi Yuuki Kensuka Aida - Yoshitsugu Matsuoka Sakura Suzuhara - Maaya Uchida Sumire Nagara - Yuko Kaida Mido Kitakami - Rie Kugimiya Ryoji Kaji jr - Yuuko Sanpei Kotone Suzunami - Nao Touyama I do think if Evangelion ANIMA ever gets an anime then maybe they can utilize an alternate cast.

Smith » Sat Jan 25, 2025 3:32 am Given how eclectic the English dub cast of Evangelion has been, let's apply that same treatment to the Japanese cast (NOTE: no reprisals, not even having the OG VAs appear in a different role). Shinji Ikari - Ayumu Murase Rei Ayanami, Yui Ikari - Ai Kayano Asuka Langley - Haruka Tomatsu Touji Suzuhara - Yuuma Uchida Kaworu Nagisa - Mi

chunks.content:
Article: An alternate Japanese cast for Evangelion
[]: An alternate Japanese cast for Evangelion             Quote Post by C. Smith » Sat Jan 25, 2025 3:32 am Given how eclectic the English dub cast of Evangelion has been, let's apply that same treatment to the Japanese cast (NOTE: no reprisals, not even having the OG VAs appear in a different role). Shinji Ikari - Ayumu Murase Rei Ayanami, Yui Ikari - Ai Kayano Asuka Langley - Haruka Tomatsu Touji Suzuhara - Yuuma Uchida Kaworu Nagisa - Mitsuki Saiga Marie Illustrious Makinami - Sumire Uesaka Gendo Ikari - Jun'ichi Suwabe Ritsuko Akagi - Hitomi Nabatame Kozo Fuyutsuki - Takaya Hashi Misato Katsuragi - Chiaki Takahashi Ryoji Kagi - Toshiyuki Morikawa or Tomokazu Sugita Maya Ibuki - Hiromi Igarashi Makoto Hyuuga - Kengo Kawanishi Shigeru Aoba - Yuuichi Nakamura Hikari Horaki - Aoi Yuuki Kensuka Aida - Yoshitsugu Matsuoka Sakura Suzuhara - Maaya Uchida Sumire Nagara - Yuko Kaida Mido Kitakami - Rie Kugimiya Ryoji Kaji jr - Yuuko Sanpei Kotone Suzunami - Nao Touyama I do think if Evangelion ANIMA ever gets an anime then maybe they can utilize an alternate cast.
